name: audio_speech_create
description: Convert text to natural-sounding speech audio using TTS models. Supports multiple voices and output formats.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The TTS model to use: 'tts-1' or 'tts-1-hd'.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: The text to generate audio for. Maximum 4096 characters.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Speed of the generated audio (0.25 to 4.0, default 1.0).

body.input: Today is a wonderful day to build something people love!
